Song.title: Song
Song.description: A music track, video, or photo uploaded to the platform.

audioUrl.description: URL to the audio file in Storage (optional).

videoUrl.description: URL to the video file in Storage (optional).

photoUrl.description: URL to the photo file in Storage (optional).

coverUrl.description: URL to the cover image in Storage.

authorId.description: UID of the user who uploaded the content.

authorEmail.description: Email of the user who uploaded the content.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the content was created.

favoritesCount.description: Number of times the content has been favorited.

isUserUploaded.description: Whether the content was uploaded by a user.

Playlist.title: Playlist
Playlist.description: A collection of songs created by a user.

icon.description: URL to the playlist icon image.

isPublic.description: Whether the playlist is visible to everyone.

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the playlist.

songIds.description: List of song document IDs in the playlist.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the playlist was created.

Favorite.title: Favorite
Favorite.description: A record of a user favoriting a song.

userId.description: UID of the user who favorited the song.

songId.description: ID of the song that was favorited.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the favorite was created.

favorites.description: Collection of user favorites (doc ID is userId_songId).
